title: erodium populifolium
intro: Erodium populifolium, also known as the red-stemmed geranium or red-stemmed heron's bill, is a perennial plant belonging to the geranium family. The plant's leaves, roots, and stems are used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Erodium populifolium include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
